meta.title: Santiago Ramírez · App Development, Coaching & Digital Marketing
meta.description: I build the app, system or e-commerce your business needs. Demo in 48hrs, delivery in 15 days. Villa María, Argentina.
meta.ogTitle: Does your business need a system? I build it in 15 days.
meta.ogDescription: Apps, e-commerce, marketplaces and custom systems. Free demo before paying.

hero.titleHighlight: a system that works for you
hero.subtitle: I build {highlight} Demo on your phone in 48 hours, app ready in 15 days.
hero.subtitleHighlight: the app, e-commerce or system you're missing to stop doing everything manually.
hero.ctaSubtext: No commitment · I reply within the day

pain.label: Sound familiar?
pain.title: If any of this sounds like you, you need a system
pain.subtitle: It's not your fault. But it is your problem.

items.title: Your clients can't find you
items.desc: You have no digital presence or the one you have generates zero leads. Your competitors do show up.

items.title: You run everything on WhatsApp and Excel
items.desc: Manual quotes, scattered data, things that get lost. It works until it doesn't.

items.title: There aren't enough hours
items.desc: Answering, quoting, billing, following up. All you, all day. It doesn't scale.

items.title: You already paid and it didn't work
items.desc: A website nobody uses, a half-built system, someone who stopped responding.

pain.costDesc: Clients that don't arrive, wasted time and avoidable errors. This is what it costs to not have a system.
pain.bridge: All of this is fixable. And faster than you think.

differentiator.label: My edge
differentiator.title: Try first, decide later
differentiator.subtitle: Within 48 hours I send you a working demo with your brand and your logic. You open it on your phone. If you're not convinced, you don't pay.

features.title: Your brand
features.desc: Your logo, your colors. Not a template.

features.title: On your phone
features.desc: Open a link and try it like a real app.

features.title: Your logic
features.desc: Simulates the real flow of your business.

features.title: No commitment
features.desc: Didn't like it, don't pay. Simple.

differentiator.proof: 9 out of 10 clients approve the project after seeing the demo.

items.name: Martín L.
items.text: He built our system in 2 weeks. We use it every day.

items.name: Claudia R.
items.text: Met every deadline and the platform turned out exactly as we asked.

items.name: Roberto S.
items.text: Quotes used to take 30 minutes. Now they take 2.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: This is already running
projects.subtitle: Real projects with measurable results.
projects.disclaimer: We don't publish client names or domains for confidentiality. All results are real and verifiable.

process.label: How I work
process.title: From idea to app in 15 days
process.subtitle: Fixed price. No surprises. No fine print.

steps.title: We talk
steps.desc: You tell me what you need. I tell you if I can help and how.

steps.title: Demo in 48hrs
steps.desc: I send you a demo with your brand to try on your phone.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Visible progress every 2-3 days. You see your project grow.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Your app running, documented, with 30 days of support.

automation.label: Automation
automation.title: Let your business run itself
automation.subtitle: Your system responds, manages, sells and notifies. You focus on what matters.

features.title: Auto responses
features.desc: Your clients get instant answers, any time of day.

features.title: Organized management
features.desc: Clients, statuses, history. All in one panel, no spreadsheets.

features.title: Auto notifications
features.desc: WhatsApp, email or push. Nobody forgets anything.

features.title: Sales without you
features.desc: Catalog, cart, payments. Your business sells even when you're not there.

services.label: Services
services.title: What does your business need?
services.subtitle: Each service targets a specific result.

items.name: Mobile app
items.desc: Your business on your clients' phones. Installs without stores.

items.name: Marketplace
items.desc: Connect supply with demand. Profiles, search, payments, admin panel.

items.name: E-commerce
items.desc: Online store with catalog, cart, payments and management panel.

items.name: Landing page
items.desc: Page that converts visits into leads. SEO, WhatsApp, analytics.

items.name: Custom system
items.desc: Appointments, inventory, CRM, billing. Whatever your business needs.

services.help: Not sure which one you need?

coaching.label: Coaching & mentoring
coaching.title: I don't just build the tool. I help you grow your business.
coaching.subtitle: Certified Professional Coach (180 hrs), Marketing degree and developer. I bring all three together so your business actually moves forward.

forWho.title: Is this for you?
items: You have a business and want to scale but don't know where to start
You need a digital strategy and someone to help you execute it
You want to stop firefighting and start organizing
You already have a website or app but aren't getting results from it

starter.desc: 90 minutes to analyze your situation and build a concrete action plan.

pro.name: Monthly Mentoring
pro.desc: Weekly support. Strategy, execution and follow-through.

vip.name: VIP Integral
vip.desc: Coaching + strategy + implementation. Your complete external team.

coaching.note: Cancel anytime. First session guaranteed: if it wasn't useful, 100% refund.
